title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7580688669552430142","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越成狗血爽文里的废物昏君，开局就要被气运之子“龙王”杀进皇宫，逼着下跪道歉？
权臣在看戏，太后在冷笑，蛮夷叩关，藩王反叛，简直是地狱开局！
幸好，【第四天灾召唤系统】觉醒！
消耗国运，就能召唤来自异世界、悍不畏死、脑回路清奇的“玩家”军团？
从此，整个世界的画风都被带歪了。
龙王主角：“昏君！我忍辱负重三年，今日只求你一个道歉！”
我方玩家：“哇！金色传说级人形BOSS！兄弟们首杀冲啊！爆装备了！”
敌国大军：“我们兵强马壮，踏平京城只在旦夕！”
我方玩家：“PVP国战终于开了？别拦着我，我要去送死刷战绩！”
权臣：“陛下，国库空虚，无力赈灾啊！”
我方玩家：“快看论坛新置顶的搬砖任务！奖励贡献度，能换会飞的剑啊！”
高坐龙椅的赵恒微微一笑。
龙王？权臣？敌国？
不，你们都只是朕用来“骗”玩家卖命的经验包罢了。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2ofa787400b3d3ad9bc28d14c9d5c5c285~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"摆烂的神秘人","author_id":"","book_id":"7580688669552430142","book_name":"朕的江山，全靠玩家肝","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201810","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":498,"name":"皇帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=498&name=皇帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":855,"name":"第四天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=855&name=第四天灾&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7580748710619923006","read_count":"970","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"593924"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"252","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,系统,穿越,皇帝,第四天灾","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2ofa787400b3d3ad9bc28d14c9d5c5c285~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779452838&x-signature=53tGfdWmvGKBIfKd%2FTnn%2FLXARdo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"954005645167588","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"50"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323202718607C878C4BBF9F1CC455"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"f
